postgres.description: Query Postgres DB directly from Cursor. Use read-only credentials for production. Set DATABASE_URL in your .env.

github.description: Access GitHub repo context: commits, PRs, issues. Add GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN to your .env.

render.description: Manage Render services (API, Worker, Redis). Pull CPU/memory metrics, build logs, error logs, and query hosted Postgres.

prisma.description: Apply schema migrations, introspect schema, push changes, and generate Prisma client via natural language in Cursor Agent mode.

sentry.description: 27 tools for error analysis, issue tracking, and performance monitoring. Ask: 'what errors hit my ingestion worker in the last 24 hours?' Auth via OAuth on first use.

vercel.description: Deployment status, build logs, and runtime function logs for the rostermind Next.js app. Auth via OAuth on first use.

clerk.description: Look up users, inspect auth sessions, and pull SDK snippets. Useful for debugging user tier/credit issues. Auth via OAuth on first use.

stripe.description: 25 tools: customers, subscriptions, invoices, refunds. Phase 2 readiness. Auth via OAuth on first use.

miro.description: Create and update architecture diagrams on the RZF architecture board. Auth via OAuth on first use — works on free plan.
